platform_dir_entry_t(3) Library Functions Manual platform_dir_entry_t(3)

NAME

platform_dir_entry_t - Directory entry information for platform_dir_foreach().

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/platform/filesystem.h>

Data Fields


const char * name
bool is_dir

Detailed Description

Directory entry information for platform_dir_foreach().

Definition at line 409 of file filesystem.h.

Field Documentation

bool platform_dir_entry_t::is_dir

true if entry is a directory
